author: doll-agent
content: Added Array-API-2023 standard-name aliases unique_values, unique_counts, unique_inverse, unique_all to ferray-stats::searching as thin wrappers around the existing unique() function with the appropriate flags toggled. unique_all returns a 4-tuple (values, indices, inverse, counts) — clippy::type_complexity allowed since this matches the documented Array-API contract. Re-exported via ferray-stats lib.rs and umbrella ferray crate. 4 unit tests verify alias parity.
